name: Ankur Sharma
headline: Software Developer | Full Stack | MERN, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker
summary: Software Developer with 1+ year of experience building full-stack applications. Backend-focused with strong expertise in REST APIs, CI/CD pipelines, Docker deployments, and database design using PostgreSQL and MongoDB. Solved 500+ DSA problems on LeetCode with a contest rating of 1500+.
skills: Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn, Express, Node.js, Prisma, Git, Docker, JWT, Zod, Clerk, Cloudflare Workers, GitHub, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL
primary_skills: Node.js, React, PostgreSQL, Docker, REST APIs
education_degree: Master in Computer Application (MCA) - Specialization: Cloud Computing
projects: 1. Live GPS Tracker - Real-time delivery tracking using WebSocket, Leaflet, Node.js. Handled GPS noise, connection drops and live location streaming. 2. SJA Care Center - Chiropractic platform built with MERN stack, appointment booking, deployed on Hostinger with AWS. 3. IRCTC-like Ticket Booking System - Seat allocation with age-based prioritization, RAC and cancellation handling, 100+ simulated bookings.
achievement: Solved 500+ DSA problems on LeetCode and 150+ on GeeksforGeeks. Achieved 1500+ contest rating on LeetCode with top rank of 822 out of 32,000+ participants in Weekly Contest 502.
resume_text: Software Developer with 1+ year experience. Built full-stack applications using MERN, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Docker. Strong in system design, REST APIs, and CI/CD. 500+ DSA problems solved on LeetCode.
cover_letter: I am excited to apply for this role as it aligns perfectly with my backend-focused development experience. At Unarrow Digital Solutions, I led end-to-end delivery of multiple client projects using MERN stack, PostgreSQL, and Docker. I have a strong foundation in DSA with 500+ problems solved and a LeetCode contest rating of 1500+. I am confident I can contribute effectively to your engineering team from day one.
